info.title: Skillbytes API - PBL Module
info.description: REST API for Problem-Based Learning (PBL) Case Management System

post.description: Create a new assessment with title, description, and time limit. Only accessible by admin and guru.

400.description: Validation error or slug already exists

put.description: Update an existing assessment. Only accessible by admin and guru. Can update slug, title, description, and time limit.

delete.description: Delete an assessment permanently. Only accessible by admin and guru. Deleting an assessment will also delete all related questions and options.

get.description: Retrieve all sections for a specific case

post.description: Create a new section for a case

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can create sections
Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can update sections
Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can delete sections

post.description: Create a new item in a section

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can create items
Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can update items
Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can delete items

post.description: Upload an image for PBL cases or section items. Only accessible to Admin and Guru roles.

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can upload images

post.description: Add a new option/answer choice to a question. One option must be marked as correct answer. Only accessible by admin and guru.

question_id.description: Question ID - must match URL parameter

label.description: Option label (A, B, C, D, etc.)

put.description: Update an existing option. Only accessible by admin and guru.

delete.description: Delete an option from a question. Only accessible by admin and guru.

get.description: Retrieve all available PBL cases with current user's status

post.summary: Create a new PBL case (Admin/Guru only)
post.description: Create a new PBL case with all details. Only accessible to Admin and Guru roles.

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can create cases

get.description: Retrieve full details of a specific PBL case including all sections and items

put.description: Update an existing PBL case. Only accessible to Admin and Guru roles.

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can update cases

delete.description: Delete an existing PBL case. Only accessible to Admin and Guru roles.

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin and Guru can delete cases

get.description: Retrieve all PBL levels available in the system. Accessible to all authenticated users.

200.description: List of PBL levels retrieved successfully

post.summary: Create a new PBL level (Admin only)
post.description: Create a new PBL level. Only accessible to Admin role.

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin can create levels

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific PBL level by ID. Accessible to all authenticated users.

put.description: Update an existing PBL level. Only accessible to Admin role.

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin can update levels

delete.description: Delete an existing PBL level. Only accessible to Admin role.

403.description: Forbidden - Only Admin can delete levels

post.description: Add a new question to an assessment. Only accessible by admin and guru.

text.example: What is the capital of France?

explanation.example: France is located in Western Europe. Paris is the capital and largest city.

put.description: Update an existing question. Only accessible by admin and guru.

text.example: What is the capital of Germany?

delete.description: Delete a question from an assessment. Only accessible by admin and guru. Deleting a question will also delete all its options and related answers.

get.description: Retrieve all assessment results from all users with pagination. Only accessible by admin and guru.
Retrieve detailed result of a specific assessment attempt including all answers and correctness. Only accessible by admin and guru.
Retrieve a paginated list of all available assessments
Retrieve detailed assessment with all questions and options. Note: is_correct field is NOT included to prevent answer leakage.

post.description: Begin taking an assessment. Only one active attempt allowed per assessment per user.
Submit user's answer. Each question can only be answered once. Cannot answer after completion or timeout.

400.description: Question already answered or attempt not in progress

post.summary: Complete assessment and get final score
post.description: Finalize the assessment attempt. Calculates score automatically.

400.description: Attempt timed out or not in progress

get.description: Retrieve all submissions made by the current user

post.summary: Submit answer for a PBL case
post.description: Submit an answer to a PBL case with optional text and/or file upload. Can only submit once per case. Answer data includes user_id for scoring purposes.

requestBody.description: Case submission with answer text and/or file

400.description: Already submitted or case not available

get.description: Get details of a specific submission
Retrieve all completed assessment attempts for the authenticated user
Retrieve detailed result of a specific assessment attempt including all answers, options, and correct answers for review

post.description: Create a new user account. Default role is 'siswa' (student).
Authenticate user with email and password. Returns user data and bearer token.
Logout current user and invalidate the authentication token.

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of lessons for authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new lesson. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.

get.description: Retrieve all available lessons for authenticated user without pagination.
Retrieve detailed lesson information by slug.

post.description: Update an existing lesson. Use POST for form-data/file uploads. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.

delete.description: Delete a lesson permanently. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.

get.description: Retrieve all lessons for a specific level.
Retrieve all lessons completed by the authenticated user.
Retrieve paginated list of learning levels.

post.description: Create a new learning level. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.

get.description: Retrieve all learning levels with their associated lessons.
Retrieve detailed information of a specific level by level number.

put.description: Update an existing learning level. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.

delete.description: Delete a learning level permanently. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of users with optional search and sorting. Accessible to all authenticated users.
Retrieve all users without pagination. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.
Retrieve detailed information of a specific user by ID.

post.description: Update user information. Use POST when uploading files/form-data. Supports partial updates via PATCH/PUT with JSON body.

delete.description: Delete a user account permanently. Only accessible to admin and guru roles.

post.description: Create a new user account. Only accessible to admin and guru roles. Supports profile photo upload.

requestBody.description: User data with optional profile photo

post.description: Mark a lesson as completed for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's overall progress including completed lessons and levels.

tags.name: PBL Cases
tags.description: PBL case management (GET for all users, CRUD for Admin/Guru only)

tags.name: PBL Levels
tags.description: Manage PBL levels (GET for all users, CRUD for Admin only)
